name: libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl
title: libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl
summary: module to provide information on conflicts for Module::Runtime
description:
module to provide information on conflicts for Module::Runtime
Module::Runtime::Conflicts provides conflicts checking for Module::Runtime,
which had a recent release that broke some versions of Moose. It is called
from Moose::Conflicts and moose-outdated.
